description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof and light-colored exterior walls, set within a rectangular lot bordered by low walls. The front facade features a covered porch supported by columns, flanked by symmetrical windows and landscaping with shrubs and a tree. The rear of the property includes a rectangular swimming pool and a driveway with a parked car, as well as additional trees and greenery. The roof has dormer windows, adding architectural interest and natural light to the interior. The lot is landscaped with grass strips and paved walkways, and the overall design is clean and suburban. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from masonry and wood, with glass windows and asphalt roofing.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, covered front porch, symmetrical windows, and a backyard pool within a landscaped suburban lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, symmetrical windows, and landscaped entry with shrubs and a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, driveway with a car, and a tree near the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, backyard, and rear windows, with a car parked near the pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable roof, side yard, and additional landscaping along the property boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
